description_long: This object consists of two shotguns placed on a rectangular wooden table, accompanied by a small box of shotgun shells and several loose shells. The shotguns have wooden stocks and fore-ends, with metallic barrels and receivers, and are positioned parallel to each other. The barrels are long and slender, with a break-action hinge visible at the midpoint, indicating a break-action mechanism. The stocks are full-length and straight, made of polished wood, and the trigger guards are rounded and metallic. The box of shells is rectangular, colored red and white, and the loose shells are cylindrical with red casings and brass bases. The table surface is smooth and glossy, with a natural wood grain pattern.
description: Two break-action shotguns with wooden stocks and metallic barrels rest on a polished wooden table, accompanied by a box and loose red shotgun shells.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shotguns laid out parallel on the table, with the box of shells and loose shells clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the length of the shotguns and the alignment of the shells and box along the table's surface.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both shotguns and the box of shells visible from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the break-action hinge and the arrangement of the shells and box along the table.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, both barrels of equal length and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded metallic trigger guard of moderate size, no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
